TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: qalang_Rgayung澳花部落
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == cyan te inu qa qalang 部落概況與位置 == mqesu kbhul pitu pgan magan he qabax qalang qani, qalang Rgayung qani hiya ga maki tyugan kkian naha, te qutux ga maki te iyil syax na llyung Hping, cnllwan naha qalang Hounatsi, akya spatul meta knbawiq nya, ro qutux loyi maki te iyil llyung ra', cnlalu naha qalang Taya, aki tuyu mpux pgan meta knbawiq nya, glux ryaniq Suhwa musa bling Hanpen, glux syax rrgyax skura shoyu musa tehok qalang Taya. saying qalang ga baha hmcwa hmol qsya, mica qa maki hnoran, glux syax llyung maki qutux heci na cipaq, piyux mwah cqani tiyaw qa ccquliq kahat heci cqani. . cinllwan lalu qalang 地名由來 qalang Rgayung ga htgan cqa ziray Ipun, piyux cquliq mwah cqani tmqalang, baha hmcwa tnaq maki cqa llyung Hping na llyung大濁水溪, mica qa lalu tringan ga 大濁水 kusa, ziray Cyukok lga, baha hmcwa ini blaq pungan lalu naha ro, si psyugan lalu si soy Rgatung. bbrwan pqutan qqalang na ziray Ipun mha, tringan sqynux cqa qalang kmuyaw(imi ga mstul ini ga btunux), bih na knbabaw na llyung Tamali, baha hmcwa n_gyut piyux ccquliq lga, uka qmayah naha la, ro mehong lga msqunan ki ciyan na ccquliq na qalang Tawsa(Seediq zok), msqun prayas rgyax tehok te llyung Moken(babaw nqa llyung Hpingpe), qutux kkian knsobih ki qalang kinyang, knblayan naha qutux xqayus na qalang. . pinhknyan qalang 部落遷徙 cinpuqing qalang Rgayung ga knahul qalang Moyaw, Papo-kaykay, Papoligaw, Ryuhen, Truku mwah mimax tnqalang. kintayux Kiristo, Tensinkyo naha ga maki cqa qnxan qalang, musa kyokay msqun inori, msqun pung ke, kblay smruw sn'lungan naha, snhyan miyup qnxan naha, gaga snhyan ro ryax pqasan naha ga musa psqunan qalang, sinxu,bokusi ga psbaq ro mlahang qabax naha, snhyan ro gaga si smimax qabax, kblayan kntayux cquliq, Kiristo ro Tensinkyo kmayan siyan, glwani, psimux, kblay qutux prrax ro blaq na qalang, maki cka qalang ga, iyat nanaq snhyan qa Kiristo ro Tensinkyo, pyanga yaw qa gaga ro qalang, kblay qutux kblaq na qalang. 基督, . wahan mangay mcisan 部落景點 glux kisya : glgan kisya ski Nanaw ro biyaq kya, rog lux 計程車, si ski tehok tgliq na Rgayung.
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨjan te inu qa qalaŋ ******* == mqes~ɕu kβħul pitu pɣan maɣan ħe qaβax qalaŋ qani, qalaŋ rɣajuŋ qani ħija ɣa maki tjuɣan kkian naħa, te qutux ɣa maki te ijil s~ɕjax na lljuŋ ħpiŋ, ʦ~ʨnllwan naħa qalaŋ ħounats~ɕi, akja s~ɕpatul meta knβawiq nja, ro qutux loji maki te ijil lljuŋ raʔ, ʦ~ʨnlalu naħa qalaŋ taja, aki tuju mpux pɣan meta knβawiq nja, ɣlux rjaniq s~ɕuħwa mus~ɕa βliŋ ħanpen, ɣlux s~ɕjax rrɣjax s~ɕkura s~ɕħoju mus~ɕa teħok qalaŋ taja. s~ɕajiŋ qalaŋ ɣa βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa ħmol qs~ɕja, miʦ~ʨa qa maki ħnoran, ɣlux s~ɕjax lljuŋ maki qutux ħeʦ~ʨi na ʦ~ʨipaq, pijux mwaħ ʦ~ʨqani tijaw qa ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq kaħat ħeʦ~ʨi ʦ~ʨqani. . ʦ~ʨinllwan lalu qalaŋ **** qalaŋ rɣajuŋ ɣa ħtɣan ʦ~ʨqa ziraj ipun, pijux ʦ~ʨquliq mwaħ ʦ~ʨqani tmqalaŋ, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa tnaq maki ʦ~ʨqa lljuŋ ħpiŋ na lljuŋ****, miʦ~ʨa qa lalu triŋan ɣa *** kus~ɕa, ziraj ʦ~ʨjukok lɣa, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa ini βlaq puŋan lalu naħa ro, s~ɕi ps~ɕjuɣan lalu s~ɕi s~ɕoj rɣatuŋ. ββrwan pqutan qqalaŋ na ziraj ipun mħa, triŋan s~ɕqjnux ʦ~ʨqa qalaŋ kmujaw(imi ɣa ms~ɕtul ini ɣa βtunux), βiħ na knβaβaw na lljuŋ tamali, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa nɣjut pijux ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq lɣa, uka qmajaħ naħa la, ro meħoŋ lɣa ms~ɕqunan ki ʦ~ʨijan na ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq na qalaŋ taws~ɕa(s~ɕee*iq zok), ms~ɕqun prajas~ɕ rɣjax teħok te lljuŋ moken(βaβaw nqa lljuŋ ħpiŋpe), qutux kkian kns~ɕoβiħ ki qalaŋ kinjaŋ, knβlajan naħa qutux xqajus~ɕ na qalaŋ. . pinħknjan qalaŋ **** ʦ~ʨinpuqiŋ qalaŋ rɣajuŋ ɣa knaħul qalaŋ mojaw, papo-kajkaj, papoliɣaw, rjuħen, truku mwaħ mimax tnqalaŋ. kintajux kiris~ɕto, tens~ɕinkjo naħa ɣa maki ʦ~ʨqa qnxan qalaŋ, mus~ɕa kjokaj ms~ɕqun inori, ms~ɕqun puŋ ke, kβlaj s~ɕmruw s~ɕnʔluŋan naħa, s~ɕnħjan mijup qnxan naħa, ɣaɣa s~ɕnħjan ro rjax pqas~ɕan naħa ɣa mus~ɕa ps~ɕqunan qalaŋ, s~ɕinxu,βokus~ɕi ɣa ps~ɕβaq ro mlaħaŋ qaβax naħa, s~ɕnħjan ro ɣaɣa s~ɕi s~ɕmimax qaβax, kβlajan kntajux ʦ~ʨquliq, kiris~ɕto ro tens~ɕinkjo kmajan s~ɕijan, ɣlwani, ps~ɕimux, kβlaj qutux prrax ro βlaq na qalaŋ, maki ʦ~ʨka qalaŋ ɣa, ijat nanaq s~ɕnħjan qa kiris~ɕto ro tens~ɕinkjo, pjaŋa jaw qa ɣaɣa ro qalaŋ, kβlaj qutux kβlaq na qalaŋ. **, . waħan maŋaj mʦ~ʨis~ɕan **** ɣlux kis~ɕja : ɣlɣan kis~ɕja s~ɕki nanaw ro βijaq kja, roɣ lux ***, s~ɕi s~ɕki teħok tɣliq na rɣajuŋ.
S.FORM: == cyan te inu qa qalang 部落概況與位置 == mqesu kbhul pitu pgan magan he qabax qalang qani, qalang Rgayung qani hiya ga maki tyugan kkian naha, te qutux ga maki te iyil syax na llyung Hping, cnllwan naha qalang Hounatsi, akya spatul meta knbawiq nya, ro qutux loyi maki te iyil llyung ra', cnlalu naha qalang Taya, aki tuyu mpux pgan meta knbawiq nya, glux ryaniq Suhwa musa bling Hanpen, glux syax rrgyax skura shoyu musa tehok qalang Taya. saying qalang ga baha hmcwa hmol qsya, mica qa maki hnoran, glux syax llyung maki qutux heci na cipaq, piyux mwah cqani tiyaw qa ccquliq kahat heci cqani. . cinllwan lalu qalang 地名由來 qalang Rgayung ga htgan cqa ziray Ipun, piyux cquliq mwah cqani tmqalang, baha hmcwa tnaq maki cqa llyung Hping na llyung大濁水溪, mica qa lalu tringan ga 大濁水 kusa, ziray Cyukok lga, baha hmcwa ini blaq pungan lalu naha ro, si psyugan lalu si soy Rgatung. bbrwan pqutan qqalang na ziray Ipun mha, tringan sqynux cqa qalang kmuyaw(imi ga mstul ini ga btunux), bih na knbabaw na llyung Tamali, baha hmcwa n_gyut piyux ccquliq lga, uka qmayah naha la, ro mehong lga msqunan ki ciyan na ccquliq na qalang Tawsa(Seediq zok), msqun prayas rgyax tehok te llyung Moken(babaw nqa llyung Hpingpe), qutux kkian knsobih ki qalang kinyang, knblayan naha qutux xqayus na qalang. . pinhknyan qalang 部落遷徙 cinpuqing qalang Rgayung ga knahul qalang Moyaw, Papo-kaykay, Papoligaw, Ryuhen, Truku mwah mimax tnqalang. kintayux Kiristo, Tensinkyo naha ga maki cqa qnxan qalang, musa kyokay msqun inori, msqun pung ke, kblay smruw sn'lungan naha, snhyan miyup qnxan naha, gaga snhyan ro ryax pqasan naha ga musa psqunan qalang, sinxu,bokusi ga psbaq ro mlahang qabax naha, snhyan ro gaga si smimax qabax, kblayan kntayux cquliq, Kiristo ro Tensinkyo kmayan siyan, glwani, psimux, kblay qutux prrax ro blaq na qalang, maki cka qalang ga, iyat nanaq snhyan qa Kiristo ro Tensinkyo, pyanga yaw qa gaga ro qalang, kblay qutux kblaq na qalang. 基督, . wahan mangay mcisan 部落景點 glux kisya : glgan kisya ski Nanaw ro biyaq kya, rog lux 計程車, si ski tehok tgliq na Rgayung.
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨjan te inu qa qalaŋ ******* == mqes~ɕu kβħul pitu pɣan maɣan ħe qaβax qalaŋ qani, qalaŋ rɣajuŋ qani ħija ɣa maki tjuɣan kkian naħa, te qutux ɣa maki te ijil s~ɕjax na lljuŋ ħpiŋ, ʦ~ʨnllwan naħa qalaŋ ħounats~ɕi, akja s~ɕpatul meta knβawiq nja, ro qutux loji maki te ijil lljuŋ raʔ, ʦ~ʨnlalu naħa qalaŋ taja, aki tuju mpux pɣan meta knβawiq nja, ɣlux rjaniq s~ɕuħwa mus~ɕa βliŋ ħanpen, ɣlux s~ɕjax rrɣjax s~ɕkura s~ɕħoju mus~ɕa teħok qalaŋ taja. s~ɕajiŋ qalaŋ ɣa βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa ħmol qs~ɕja, miʦ~ʨa qa maki ħnoran, ɣlux s~ɕjax lljuŋ maki qutux ħeʦ~ʨi na ʦ~ʨipaq, pijux mwaħ ʦ~ʨqani tijaw qa ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq kaħat ħeʦ~ʨi ʦ~ʨqani. . ʦ~ʨinllwan lalu qalaŋ **** qalaŋ rɣajuŋ ɣa ħtɣan ʦ~ʨqa ziraj ipun, pijux ʦ~ʨquliq mwaħ ʦ~ʨqani tmqalaŋ, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa tnaq maki ʦ~ʨqa lljuŋ ħpiŋ na lljuŋ****, miʦ~ʨa qa lalu triŋan ɣa *** kus~ɕa, ziraj ʦ~ʨjukok lɣa, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa ini βlaq puŋan lalu naħa ro, s~ɕi ps~ɕjuɣan lalu s~ɕi s~ɕoj rɣatuŋ. ββrwan pqutan qqalaŋ na ziraj ipun mħa, triŋan s~ɕqjnux ʦ~ʨqa qalaŋ kmujaw(imi ɣa ms~ɕtul ini ɣa βtunux), βiħ na knβaβaw na lljuŋ tamali, βaħa ħmʦ~ʨwa nɣjut pijux ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq lɣa, uka qmajaħ naħa la, ro meħoŋ lɣa ms~ɕqunan ki ʦ~ʨijan na ʦ~ʨʦ~ʨquliq na qalaŋ taws~ɕa(s~ɕee*iq zok), ms~ɕqun prajas~ɕ rɣjax teħok te lljuŋ moken(βaβaw nqa lljuŋ ħpiŋpe), qutux kkian kns~ɕoβiħ ki qalaŋ kinjaŋ, knβlajan naħa qutux xqajus~ɕ na qalaŋ. . pinħknjan qalaŋ **** ʦ~ʨinpuqiŋ qalaŋ rɣajuŋ ɣa knaħul qalaŋ mojaw, papo-kajkaj, papoliɣaw, rjuħen, truku mwaħ mimax tnqalaŋ. kintajux kiris~ɕto, tens~ɕinkjo naħa ɣa maki ʦ~ʨqa qnxan qalaŋ, mus~ɕa kjokaj ms~ɕqun inori, ms~ɕqun puŋ ke, kβlaj s~ɕmruw s~ɕnʔluŋan naħa, s~ɕnħjan mijup qnxan naħa, ɣaɣa s~ɕnħjan ro rjax pqas~ɕan naħa ɣa mus~ɕa ps~ɕqunan qalaŋ, s~ɕinxu,βokus~ɕi ɣa ps~ɕβaq ro mlaħaŋ qaβax naħa, s~ɕnħjan ro ɣaɣa s~ɕi s~ɕmimax qaβax, kβlajan kntajux ʦ~ʨquliq, kiris~ɕto ro tens~ɕinkjo kmajan s~ɕijan, ɣlwani, ps~ɕimux, kβlaj qutux prrax ro βlaq na qalaŋ, maki ʦ~ʨka qalaŋ ɣa, ijat nanaq s~ɕnħjan qa kiris~ɕto ro tens~ɕinkjo, pjaŋa jaw qa ɣaɣa ro qalaŋ, kβlaj qutux kβlaq na qalaŋ. **, . waħan maŋaj mʦ~ʨis~ɕan **** ɣlux kis~ɕja : ɣlɣan kis~ɕja s~ɕki nanaw ro βijaq kja, roɣ lux ***, s~ɕi s~ɕki teħok tɣliq na rɣajuŋ.
